title: Task outcome: task-20260706-231712-OS_COMPLETION_CONDITIONS.md-
summary: Improved DinoBrain against OS_COMPLETION_CONDITIONS without claiming full OS completion. Added a public-data safety verifier that scans the real data vault, reconciles GitHub visibility with docs, detects raw transcript/secret/local-only markers, verifies default-index exclusions, and writes public-data safety reports. Reconciled docs away from private-only data repo assumptions. Added a reusable RAG source-anchor seeding command and seeded user-provided RAG methodology anchors as anchor_only_unverified source/provenance candidates, plus a RAG Methodology Anchor Catalog. Rebuilt Wiki/SQLite indexes and graph health; verified RAG anchors are searchable through SQLite-backed wiki_search. Build, check, and verify:v2 passed. Current graph health and public-data safety remain degraded, not complete.

decisions: Treat user-provided RAG URLs as durable provenance anchors, not verified source truth.
Mark all seeded RAG sources as anchor_only_unverified until fetched, chunked, claim-linked, and reviewed.
Treat the data remote as public-safe by default when GitHub reports public or visibility is unknown.
Do not claim OS completion; this pass only improves gates 7, 12, 14, and 15.
next_steps: Fetch and summarize RAG anchors into bounded source chunks with concrete claim lineage.
Reduce broad auto-compounded behavior rules so Source/Wiki/Project records are not swamped in retrieval.
Create real-vault behavior golden cases for RAG/source-provenance and measure memory-on versus memory-off behavior quality.
Get fresh trusted Codex live prompt proof before any manual MCP call.
